title: Immowelt Property Search Scraper
description: Search Immowelt property listings by location and property type. Each returned listing is saved as one dataset item.

location.title: Location
location.description: City, district, postal code, or location query to search on Immowelt.

property_type.title: Property Type
property_type.description: Immowelt property type to request from Scrappa, such as apartment.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Number of listings to request for this page.
